examples.input_text: Chair Smith: 'On the basis of the analysis package, I propose we approve the 7 GHz downlink protection criterion of -10.5 dB I/N at the 80th percentile. Any objections?' (no objections) 'Approved.'

expected_output.decision_text: Approved the 7 GHz downlink protection criterion of -10.5 dB I/N at the 80th percentile.
expected_output.speaker: Chair Smith

examples.input_text: NTIA Lead: 'We're going to defer the decision on aggregate interference methodology until TWG-B reports back next session. Let's not vote on this today.'

expected_output.decision_text: Deferred the decision on aggregate interference methodology pending TWG-B report.
expected_output.speaker: NTIA Lead

examples.input_text: Chair Smith: 'DoD is required to submit revised ERP values for the candidate uplink scenario by the next plenary. Owner is the AFSMO representative.'

expected_output.decision_text: DoD required to submit revised ERP values for the candidate uplink scenario by next plenary. Owner: AFSMO representative.
expected_output.speaker: Chair Smith
